title: Trendlines for Graphs?
excerpt: I am wondering if there is a way to add trendlines to an existing graph (i.e. similar to the functionality in MS Excel).  My immediate need is to add a simple linear trendline.  Not only would it be useful to add a trend…

posts.author: scottmorley (Scott Morley)
posts.cookedHtml: I am wondering if there is a way to add trendlines to an existing graph (i.e. similar to the functionality in MS Excel). My immediate need is to add a simple linear trendline. Not only would it be useful to add a trendline on an existing graph, it would be great to be able to create a separate, trendline-only graph based upon data included in the “normal” graph.
